name: Chili Con Casa
recipeIngredient: 1 cup jalapeno peppers, seeded and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Mince the onion.
2. Heat the butter in a pan over medium heat.
3. Add the onions and sauté until translucent.
4. Stir in the tomatoes, jalapeno peppers, salt, and pepper. Cook for 5 minutes.
5. Reduce heat to low and add the cubed cream cheese. Stir until melted.
6. Gradually stir in half-and-half until the desired dip consistency is reached.
7. Serve hot with tortilla chips.
